title: Terms of use - WasteLess
description: Terms of use for the WasteLess mobile app (EN).
intro: These terms govern your use of WasteLess. By using the service, you agree to these terms.
footnote: If translations differ, mandatory local law prevails.

sections.title: 1. Service provider
paragraphs: WasteLess is published by Hilaire Giovanni, 925 Boulevard Rene-Levesque Est, Canada.

sections.title: 2. Service purpose
paragraphs: WasteLess helps users reduce food waste through inventory tracking, alerts, recipe suggestions, and shopping list tools.
The service is provided as available and may depend on third-party platform availability.

sections.title: 3. User account
bullets: You must provide accurate registration information.
You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential.
You must promptly notify us of unauthorized account access.
We may suspend or restrict accounts used in abusive or non-compliant ways.

sections.title: 4. Acceptable and prohibited use
paragraphs: You agree to use WasteLess in compliance with applicable law and these terms.
bullets: Prohibited: bypassing security, unauthorized reverse engineering, abusive scraping, fraud, harassment, or unlawful use.
Prohibited: uploading or sharing content that infringes third-party rights or violates law.
Prohibited: automated use that disrupts service stability (bots, intentional overload, API abuse).

sections.title: 5. Subscriptions and payments
bullets: Some features may require a paid Premium subscription.
In-app purchases and subscriptions are handled by the Apple App Store or Google Play, depending on your device.
Pricing, taxes, renewals, and cancellations are governed by the applicable store rules.
Deleting your WasteLess account does not automatically cancel an active store subscription.

sections.title: 6. Personal data
paragraphs: Personal data processing is described in the Privacy Policy.
By using the service, you acknowledge the use of technical processors (Firebase, OpenAI, Spoonacular, Open Food Facts, and others as described).

sections.title: 7. Intellectual property
bullets: The service, code, design, text, and visual assets are protected by intellectual property rights.
No transfer of ownership rights is granted; only a personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the service.
Unauthorized reproduction or commercial exploitation is prohibited.

sections.title: 8. AI content and suggestions
paragraphs: Automatically generated recipe suggestions and related content are provided for informational purposes.
You are responsible for verifying ingredients, allergens, preparation details, and suitability for your own context.
bullets: WasteLess does not provide medical advice or professional diagnosis.
Third-party data sources may contain errors, delays, or omissions.

sections.title: 9. Availability and service changes
bullets: We may modify, suspend, or discontinue parts of the service at any time for maintenance, security, or product evolution reasons.
We may add, modify, or remove features without maintaining legacy behavior.

sections.title: 10. Limitation of liability
paragraphs: To the extent permitted by law, WasteLess is not liable for indirect damages, loss of data, revenue loss, or downtime caused by reasonable external factors.
You use the service at your own risk.

sections.title: 11. Termination
bullets: You may stop using the service at any time.
You may request account deletion via the app or support.
We may suspend or terminate access for serious or repeated violations of these terms.

sections.title: 12. Governing law and disputes
paragraphs: These terms are interpreted under applicable laws of your jurisdiction and, where permitted, under Canadian law.
Before formal proceedings, parties should attempt an amicable resolution by contacting support.wasteless@gmail.com.

sections.title: 13. Changes to these terms
paragraphs: We may update these terms to reflect service evolution or legal requirements.
The date at the top of this page indicates the current effective version.

sections.title: 14. Contact
bullets: Support: support.wasteless@gmail.com
Legal contact: giovanni.hilaire01@gmail.com
Publisher: Hilaire Giovanni, 925 Boulevard Rene-Levesque Est, Canada
